sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64406" key="magganeuth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαγγᾰν-ευτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n64406.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impostor, quack</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
